constantPS Element

The <constantPS> element is used to set constants for use in pixel shader programs.

<constantPS
   index = integer
   comment = string
   count = integer
   parameter = string
/>

Required Attributes

index

Specifies the pixel shader constant register index. Must be an integer between 0 and 15.

Optional Attributes

comment

Comment describing the constant. This attribute is ignored during compilation.

count

Number of constant registers getting set. Each constant register consists of four floating-point values. If this attribute is not specified, count defaults to 1. Registers are set in ascending order.

parameter

Identifies the original resource. This value is set by Deep Exploration and is used for reimportation of the XDX file but is ignored by the Xbox Resource Compiler..

Element Information

Parent Elements pixelShader, pixelShaderPass
Child Elements None.

Remarks

Pixel shader constants set within a pixelShader context are treated as global constants for that shader. Constants set within a pixelShaderPass context are specific to that pass and can override the global constants.

See Also

Using a Pixel Shader Constant
